member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Controls.HexViewControl
member.summary: Renders and edits binary data as offsets, byte columns, and ASCII text inside an Avalonia control.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Model.HexAnnotation
member.summary: Describes a labeled byte range rendered as an annotation in HexViewControl.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Model.IHexFormatter
member.summary: Formats logical byte lines into the offset, hex, and ASCII representation rendered by HexViewControl.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Model.ILineReader
member.summary: Reads bytes by logical offset and line width for the HexView rendering pipeline.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.EditMode
member.summary: Determines whether edits are projected as in-place overwrites or logical insert/delete operations.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.ByteOverlay
member.summary: Projects logical edits over an underlying without mutating the original source immediately.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.EditOpType
member.summary: Describes the kind of logical edit stored in .

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.EditOperation
member.summary: Represents a single logical edit or edit batch applied to a .

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.EditJournal
member.summary: Records logical overlay edits and replays them for undo and redo.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.HexAnnotationStorage
member.summary: Loads and saves collections as JSON.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.HexFormatter
member.summary: Formats logical byte lines for display in the hex and ASCII panes.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.HexSearchService
member.summary: Provides address parsing, pattern parsing, search, and replace helpers for binary content.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.MemoryMappedLineReader
member.summary: Reads bytes from a file stream by using a memory-mapped view.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.NavigationService
member.summary: Tracks caret history, bookmarks, and changed-byte navigation for an overlay-backed document.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.SaveService
member.summary: Saves overlay-backed content either as a full file or as a simple textual patch.

member.name: T:HexView.Avalonia.Services.SelectionService
member.summary: Applies range-based copy, paste, and mutation operations against a .
